Package dk.mada.jaxrs.model.types

Class TypeNames

java.lang.Object
dk.mada.jaxrs.model.types.TypeNames
public final class TypeNames extends Object
Contains all declared type names in the model. The primitive types and a number of customary types are predefined.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes

    Class
    Description
    static final class 
    TypeNames.TypeName
    A type name.

  • Constructor Details

    • TypeNames

      public TypeNames()
      Constructs a new instance.

  • Method Details

    • rename

      public void rename(String typeName, String newTypeName)
      Adds an override name to a type name. This will make the TypeName instance for 'typeName' return the name 'newTypeName'. This method should only be used after DTOs have been consolidated.
      Parameters:
      typeName - the name of the type to rename
      newTypeName - the types new name

    • of

      public TypeNames.TypeName of(String name)
      Creates a new type name.
      Parameters:
      name - name of the type
      Returns:
      a new TypeName instance

    • info

      public String info()
      Returns information about the type names.
      Returns:
      information about the type names
